# 📱 Social Media Cards

When sharing links to Evo-Cortex on social media, the following Open Graph metadata is used:

## Recommended Preview

- **Title**: Evo-Cortex - Give Your Agent a Brain
- **Description**: Memory, Learning & Evolution for OpenClaw | npm: @evo-agents/evo-cortex
- **Image**: (Custom social card image)
- **URL**: https://github.com/luoboask/evo-cortex

## Creating a Custom Social Card

You can create a custom social card image at: `.github/social-card.png` (1280x640px recommended)

### Design Guidelines

- **Size**: 1280x640 pixels (2:1 ratio)
- **Format**: PNG or JPG
- **Content**:
  - Project name: "Evo-Cortex"
  - Tagline: "Give Your Agent a Brain"
  - Key features icons (🧠 Memory, 📚 Learning, 🧬 Evolution)
  - npm badge: @evo-agents/evo-cortex

### Tools

- [Canva](https://canva.com) - Easy online design tool
- [Figma](https://figma.com) - Professional design
- [OG Image Generator](https://og-image.vercel.app) - Auto-generate from text

## Example Design

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🧬 Evo-Cortex                         │
│                                        │
│  Give Your Agent a Brain               │
│                                        │
│  🧠 Memory  📚 Learning  🧬 Evolution │
│                                        │
│  @evo-agents/evo-cortex                │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
